steps.title: Identify the subject and determine number
steps.content: The subject is “an abstract cubist painting” (singular). The appositive phrase “—one of several works that received scorn from critics—” provides additional information but doesn't change the subject's number.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A singular subject requires a singular verb form. “has entered” is singular and agrees with the subject. B and C use plural verbs; D uses unconjugated “enter.” This is the correct answer.
